ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the city was founded */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the city in meters */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the city's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state (e.g., WA, CA) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "capital_city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the capital city of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the state's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_capital_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("capital_city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_population_history" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the population is recorded */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city for the given year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the population data (e.g., census, estimate) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the population record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_population_history_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metropolitan_areas" (
  "metro_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metropolitan area */,
  "metro_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the metropolitan area */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the metropolitan area is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the metropolitan area */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the metropolitan area in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metropolitan area's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metro_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_metro_area" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "metro_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metropolitan area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id", "metro_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "population_range" TEXT /* Population range for the category (e.g., 0-10000, 10001-50000) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_category_mapping" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., North America, South America) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_geographic_region" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic (e.g., income level, education level) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the characteristic */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the characteristic (e.g., dollars, percentage) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the characteristic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_economic_characteristics" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic characteristic */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic characteristic for the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the economic characteristic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id", "characteristic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., GIS analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the database */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "third_party_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_third_party_data" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_key" TEXT /* Key of the data provided by the source */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data provided by the source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id", "source_id", "data_key")
)
